name: binary-hype-omp
description: OMP plugins by Binary Hype — focused skills and safety hooks for professional software engineering workflows.

plugins.name: coding-assistant
plugins.description: An OMP coding assistant focused on code quality, security, and correctness. Provides production-minded skills plus a pre-tool-call safety hook for secret file access, credential commits, unsafe 1Password CLI usage, and oversized write payloads.
